author: Nishida, Tatsuo
title: Tosu yakugo no kenkyu [A study of the Tosu-Chinese vocabulary Tosu I-Yu]
notes:
in Japanese.

Nothing from this source has yet been entered.  There are two good candidates for places to find stuff to enter.  First is pp. 118-160, a Tosu-Chinese-English glossary arranged by semantic field.  The second is a Tosu-English glossary on pp. 275-290.  The former has about 800 forms, the latter about 1200, for a total of 2000.  Source shelved in Room 2.
